MEMO TO SET FOR JURY TRIAL FILED BY PLAINTIFF CONGI, JOHN SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE SET FOR NOV-27-1996 AT 02:00 PM IN DEPT 01 SET FOR JURY TRIAL ON DEC-04-1996 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 206 NOTICE OF TIME AND PLACE OF TRIAL FILED
#1 JUDGE PRO TEM GAIL HILLEBRAND, MNORMAN/CSR, ALEONG/CLERK AT SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE, CASE SETTLED ON THE RECORD.

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT PIOWITES, EWA AKA PILEWICZ, EWA THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 1085 SOUTH VAN NESS AVENUE #308, SAN FRANCISCO, CA, STAYED UNTIL JAN-31-1997, LEASE FORFEITED, EVICTION STAYED UNTIL AFTER MIDNIGHT 1-31-97. PLTF WAIVES BACK RENT & DAMAGES THRU JANUARY 1997. EACH SIDE TO BEAR OWN FEES & COSTS. GENERAL RELEASE & WAIVER. IF DEFT VACATES TIMELY, PLTF WILL MOVE TO SET ASIDE JUDGMNT & DISMISS W/PREJ
